1.4.11-non-text-contrast.remarks: Search box border is supplementary; control is identifiable via magnifying glass icon and placeholder text. Focus indicator uses primary at 4.94:1.
Checkboxes use neutral-dark (#626971) border at 5.56:1. Selected/excluded states pass 3:1.
Number input fields use border-neutral (#e5e8e8) at 1.23:1 vs white, failing 3:1 for the input boundary. Focus indicator passes. See KIT-5807.
Page buttons identified by text content. Selected state border uses primary at 4.94:1.
